How to find us
If you’ve been trying to locate Kei Cars in Karen, this will get you there without the guesswork.

Follow the route in the video and pull up with ease. No wrong turns, no stress.

Mercedes-Benz W123 Wagon.
Timeless engineering, practical design, and enduring craftsmanship, built during one of Mercedes-Benz's defining eras.

The exterior stays elegant and purposeful. Inside, the classic Mercedes cabin a focus on durability, comfort, and simplicity. Power comes from a 2.0L petrol engine paired with a manual transmission, delivering a driving experience that feels mechanical, direct, and engaging.

This is a W123 Wagon built for collectors, enthusiasts, and those who appreciate classic Mercedes-Benz engineering.

View this Mercedes-Benz W123 Wagon at
https://keicars.co.ke

Subaru Forester.

The exterior stays functional and well-proportioned. Inside, the cabin offers generous space and comfort for daily driving. Power comes from a 2.0L petrol engine paired with an automatic transmission and AWD, delivering confident handling and stable performance across varying road conditions.

This is a Forester built for practicality, comfort, and dependable everyday use.

Toyota Land Cruiser Prado J120.

The exterior stays purposeful and well-proportioned. Inside, the leather cabin and sunroof create a comfortable environment for driver and passengers alike. Power comes from a 3.0L diesel engine paired with an automatic transmission and 4WD, delivering dependable performance on highways, rough roads, and everything in between.

This is a Prado built for reliability, comfort, and long-term ownership.
